summary: Event filter query params wired end-to-end (EventService @Query → EventRepositoryImpl → GetEventsUseCase → EventsCubit.fetchEvents()). Filter badge, conditional clear button, and filtered empty state added. RiderProfilePage implemented (4 ResultState branches) with GetUserByIdUseCase, RiderProfileCubit, 2 widgets, route registered, attendee list tap navigation. 8 l10n keys added. build_runner clean.
